nextAction: Phase 8 (§22.7 prompt 8): Payment Request module per §10a — all four types (PO_INVOICE from matched invoices; ADVANCE with % of PO and later offset; NON_PO expense with category; REFUND), docnum HML-PAY; requester creates -> chief-accountant verification step (isChief flag) -> Director approval via the §6 engine (entityType PAYMENT_REQUEST; seed matrix) with §19 signatures; paid cascade: marking the payment request PAID cascades PAID to its linked invoices (and their POs' payment view); voucher PDF on the brand letterhead (reuse lib/pdf fonts/layout, payment voucher with signature block); register + detail pages; notifications. npm run check + seed + browser E2E, Phase Report, commit phase-8.
